languages.text: Судя по отросткам Погонщицы, эта тварь не могла сформироваться сама по себе — тысячи лет назад кто-то определенно вмешался в ее развитие, направив его в нужную сторону.
Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.
languages.original_text: Судя по отросткам Погонщицы, эта тварь не могла сформироваться сама по себе — тысячи лет назад кто-то определенно вмешался в ее развитие, направив его в нужную сторону.

traits.locale_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.
Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.
Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

languages.text: ドローバーの芽を見てわかるように、この生き物は自然に生じたものではない。何千年も前に、誰かがその進化を導き、正しい方向へ導いたに違いない。
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

traits.locale_text: ドローバーの芽を見てわかるように、この生き物は自然に生じたものではない。何千年も前に、誰かがその進化を導き、正しい方向へ導いたに違いない。

languages.text: 从拒生花的枝芽来看，这种生物不可能是自然演化而来的。必然有人在数千年前干预了它的生长，引导它朝正确的方向演化。
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

traits.locale_text: 从拒生花的枝芽来看，这种生物不可能是自然演化而来的。必然有人在数千年前干预了它的生长，引导它朝正确的方向演化。

languages.text: Den Trieben des Treibers zufolge kann sich die Kreatur nicht spontan gebildet haben ... jemand muss ihre Entwicklung vor Tausenden von Jahren in die richtige Richtung gelenkt haben.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

traits.locale_text: Den Trieben des Treibers zufolge kann sich die Kreatur nicht spontan gebildet haben ... jemand muss ihre Entwicklung vor Tausenden von Jahren in die richtige Richtung gelenkt haben.

languages.text: D'après ses drageons, le Chasseur n'a pas pu évoluer de façon spontanée. Il y a des milliers d'années, quelqu'un a dû interférer dans son développement et le pousser dans cette direction.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

traits.locale_text: D'après ses drageons, le Chasseur n'a pas pu évoluer de façon spontanée. Il y a des milliers d'années, quelqu'un a dû interférer dans son développement et le pousser dans cette direction.

languages.text: A juzgar por los tallos del Pastor, la criatura no se formó espontáneamente. Alguien debió de guiar su desarrollo hace milenios para crear la xenobestia que has encontrado.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

traits.locale_text: A juzgar por los tallos del Pastor, la criatura no se formó espontáneamente. Alguien debió de guiar su desarrollo hace milenios para crear la xenobestia que has encontrado.

languages.text: Çoban'ın filizlerine bakılırsa bu yaratık, kendiliğinden oluşmuş olamaz... Binlerce yıl önce birisi gelişimine müdahale edip onu doğru yöne yönlendirmiş olmalı.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.

traits.locale_text: Çoban'ın filizlerine bakılırsa bu yaratık, kendiliğinden oluşmuş olamaz... Binlerce yıl önce birisi gelişimine müdahale edip onu doğru yöne yönlendirmiş olmalı.
